resolution.guidance: Higher values produce more clusters. Use 0.3-0.5 for major lineages, 0.8-1.2 for standard analysis, 1.5-3.0 for fine-grained subtypes. Sciaraffa et al. 2025 found resolution=2.0 optimal across 3 datasets when combined with k=10 and cosine metric.

key_added.guidance: Key in adata.obs to store cluster labels. Use 'leiden_{resolution}' when sweeping multiple resolutions.

n_iterations.guidance: -1 means iterate until convergence. Set to a positive integer to cap iterations.

validation.check: At least 2 clusters. No more than 10% of total cells as number of clusters. Every cluster has at least 10 cells.
